traps.detail: a draft quickstart note claims you can POST the taxpayer directly with the HUB key
traps.correct: the HUB key is a GROUP org; direct taxpayer creation returns 405. Create a UNIT, mint a UNIT-scoped subject via X-Scope-Identifier, then provision taxpayer/location/system and commission in order.

expectations.expectation: Scopes subject creation to the UNIT org via X-Scope-Identifier, not the HUB/GROUP key directly.
Commissions taxpayer -> location -> system in order before issuing any receipts.
